# 测试孩子 · 7天方案

## 基本信息

- 昵称：测试孩子（妈妈：测试妈妈）
- 年级：六年级
- 英语成绩：90分
- 人物兴趣：刘邦
- 感兴趣的问题：刘邦怎么敢喊贺钱一万？

## 200词闯关结果（内测100词版）

**✓ 90个 / 100个**

不会的10个词：forest, penguin, chocolate, mountain, butterfly, understand, practice, spell, castle, rainbow

---

## Episode 1: Liu Bang's Big Lie

### 英文故事（The Magic History Compass，约170词）

Yaoyao had a magic history compass.

Grandpa said, "It can take you to any time in ancient China. But you can only stay for three minutes."

Today, Yaoyao read about Liu Bang. He was only a minor officer with no money. But at a big dinner, he shouted, "I offer ten thousand coins!"

Yaoyao did not understand. How dare he say that?

That night, Yaoyao turned the compass to Han and pressed the button.

Golden light flashed. Yaoyao stood in a tavern. A man in rough clothes sat drinking wine. His face was red.

"Are you Liu Bang?" Yaoyao asked.

"That's Liu Ji!" the man said with a grin.

"You had no money. How dare you shout 'ten thousand coins'?"

Liu Bang did not answer. He waved Yaoyao closer.

"Find 'offered ten thousand' in your history book. Look below," he whispered.

Golden light flashed again. Yaoyao was back in bed.

She opened the book and found the words. Under them, a line of red ink had appeared.

Yaoyao read it. The book almost fell from her hands.

### 目标词表（12个）

| 词 | 音标 | 中文 | 在故事中怎么猜出意思 |
|----|------|------|---------------------|
| compass | /ˈkʌmpəs/ | 罗盘 | magic history compass |
| ancient | /ˈeɪnʃənt/ | 古代的 | ancient China |
| minor | /ˈmaɪnər/ | 低级的 | a minor officer |
| officer | /ˈɒfɪsər/ | 官员 | a minor officer |
| offer | /ˈɒfər/ | 献上 | I offer ten thousand coins |
| coins | /kɔɪnz/ | 钱币 | ten thousand coins |
| dare | /deər/ | 敢 | How dare he say that |
| tavern | /ˈtævərn/ | 酒馆 | stood in a tavern |
| rough | /rʌf/ | 粗糙的 | rough clothes |
| grin | /ɡrɪn/ | 咧嘴笑 | said with a grin |
| whispered | /ˈwɪspərd/ | 低声说 | waved closer + whispered |
| ink | /ɪŋk/ | 墨水 | a line of red ink |
